title: (BUG) delete_status skips conversation_read_markers/conversation_hidden cleanup
description: posting.rs delete_status (lines 1446-1467) cleans up pinned_posts, post_tags, mentions, favourites, bookmarks, notifications, idempotency_keys, and nulls media — but never deletes rows from conversation_read_markers or conversation_hidden that reference the post. Both tables have `REFERENCES posts(id)` without ON DELETE CASCADE. With foreign_keys=true, deleting a post that appears in a conversation (i.e. a direct message that was read/hidden) will fail with a FK constraint violation.
